title: Register a vehicle for a temporary stay in Barbados
description: Apply for an International Circulation Permit if you are bringing a vehicle into Barbados for a short stay.
summary: If you are bringing a vehicle into Barbados temporarily, you must register it for the length of your stay. The Licensing Authority will issue an International Circulation Permit.

items: your full name, address, phone number and email
the length of your planned stay
the registration number, make, model and year of the vehicle
the engine number and chassis number

items.name: Overseas registration document for the vehicle
Carnet de Passage or shipping documents

fees: Fees depend on the length of stay and the vehicle class. Confirm at the Licensing Authority.
how_long: Permits are usually issued within 5 working days.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Registration of Vehicle for Temporary Stay form and your documents to the Barbados Licensing Authority.

contact.address:
